mapper.select: SELECT cs.section_id FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND sm.is_current = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( notification_id, recipient_user_id, sender_user_id, target_section_id, title, body, type, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(notification_id), 0) + 1 FROM notification), #{recipientUserId}, #{senderUserId}, #{targetSectionId}, #{title}, #{body}, #{type}, 0, #{createdAt} )
